name: Clara AI Pipeline - n8n Workflow Export

nodes.name: Schedule Trigger
nodes.notes: Trigger daily at 6 AM or manually

nodes.name: Read Demo Files
nodes.notes: Read demo transcript file from the dataset folder

nodes.name: Read Onboarding Files
nodes.notes: Read onboarding transcript file from the dataset folder

nodes.name: Extract Demo Data
nodes.notes: LLM-based extraction: transcript → Account Memo JSON

nodes.name: Generate v1 Agent Spec
nodes.notes: Prompt template → Retell Agent Draft Spec (v1)

nodes.name: Store v1 Memo
nodes.notes: Save Account Memo JSON using fs.writeFileSync

nodes.name: Store v1 Spec
nodes.notes: Save Agent Spec JSON using fs.writeFileSync

nodes.name: Apply Onboarding Updates
nodes.notes: Merge onboarding data with v1 → produce v2 memo, spec, and changelog

nodes.name: Store v2 Outputs
nodes.notes: Save all v2 outputs using fs.writeFileSync

meta.description: Clara AI Zero-Cost Automation Pipeline: Demo Call → Retell Agent v1 → Onboarding → Agent v2
meta.notes: Import this workflow into n8n. The extraction and generation logic is in the /scripts/ folder.
